meaning: n.[生化]生物效能(指激素等化学物质在某一生物体系中发挥作用的能力)
examples: The contents of INS MP were measured by the method of the insulin biopotency and radioimmunoassay(RIA).
Objective: to establish a method suitable to determine the purgative biopotency of rhubarb and construct a new quality evaluation pattern of rhubarb.
